task: Flagship expert task: PFAS Treatment Train Breakthrough and Media Changeout Decision. A utility detected rising PFAS levels after a GAC/IX lead-lag treatment train and must decide whether to swap vessels before a compliance sample. Use only the embedded packet provided. Flag any compound above internal-warning (70% of limit) or action level, compute a treatment-risk score defined as the maximum fraction of limit among compounds (measured_value / action_limit) and add a pressure penalty if pressure_drop_psi > 10, evaluate listed actions under the budget constraint, and recommend sample timing plus media changeout. Deliverables: a pfas_breakthrough_table.xlsx containing row-level calculations, formulas, validation checks, sensitivity perturbations around controlling thresholds, and citations to the embedded packet; and a treatment_decision_memo.md documenting methods, intermediate calculations, uncertainty notes, a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels, and explicit executable logic or formulas. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
